evidence: "Hilarious & Moving Doc, Beautiful Love Letter to Families Real & Of Choice"
"Perfect low budget, high noir trash wallow"
"It's a story of life taken as it comes, all the ups & downs and what it takes to persevere."
"The narrative framing gets a little precious."
"...the kind that so often no longer gets made."
"Keep your expectations extremely low and remember that you won't be getting these 40 minutes back."
"Is it perfect? No. But it's charming road movie, with dreamlike locations and engaging performances."
"This is some 5 star trash & I mean that in the best way possible."
"I came because I've come to adore Olivia Colman via Fleabag, The Crown & her amazing appearances on Graham Norton."
"...the beauty of doing the best you can with what you've got."
"I was crying at the end. I could not recommend this more highly."
"...the bond that was forged between subject and filmmaker on camera."

summary: The user enjoys documentaries and comedic dramas, often appreciating films that are charming and emotionally resonant. They show a preference for simple narratives and are less concerned with production quality, favoring engaging performances and heartfelt storytelling.
